title: Enchantment Outline x Bare Bones 3D Tools
description: Adds enchantment outlines to Bare Bones 3D Tools
body:
This pack gives [_Bare Bones - 3D Tools_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-3d-tools) glowing outlines when enchanted.

It is based off _FishySalmon02's [Enchantment Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-outline)_ and is required for it to work.

---

![Player in a savannah biome at night holding an enchanted diamond sword with purple outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeb550376d3d6bb6dca607e7fdc3538ac2169c9a.png)

![Player aiming an enchanted bow at a zombie outside of a base](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWH0QoEp/images/e509215957f25715d8a1df4aed1edde3df2a1807.png)
